# General Information {#sec-general-info .unnumbered}

::: callout-note
## Website URL

[{{< var url >}}]({{< var url >}}){style="font-size:2em"}

![](figures/qr_code.png)
:::

## Notebooks

-   [01-Descriptive-Statistics-Class.ipynb]({{< var colabPrefix >}}01-Descriptive-Statistics-Class.ipynb)

<!-- -->

-   [Discrete distributions](https://www.desmos.com/calculator/8qjdx4zkhg)

-   [The uniform distribution](https://www.desmos.com/calculator/cwqbsrgjpr)

-   [The Central Limit Theorem](https://colab.research.google.com/github/febse/econ2026/blob/main/03-CLT.ipynb)

-   [The Normal distribution](https://www.desmos.com/calculator/nnyfn7xq1h)

-   [OLS Geometry](https://www.desmos.com/geometry/k2yatxmvnl)

-   [OLS with one predictor](https://colab.research.google.com/github/febse/econ2026/blob/main/03-Least-Squares.ipynb)
